title: Artanthe populifolia
taxonomy: Artanthe populifolia is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It is native to tropical Africa. The plant is also known as the 'water spinach' or 'kangkung' in some regions. Further classification of Artanthe populifolia includes its genus, Artanthe, which is part of the larger group of flowering plants known as angiosperms. This classification reflects the plant's unique characteristics and evolutionary history.
